headline: Think It’s Too Late to Buy Texas Instruments? Here’s the Case for Getting In Now

headline: Texas Instruments Buys Silicon Labs As AI And Industrial Momentum Builds
summary: Texas Instruments (NasdaqGS:TXN) announced an agreement to acquire Silicon Labs, adding embedded wireless connectivity to its portfolio. The deal is paired with robust Q1 results that highlight growth in data center and industrial demand. Management linked the acquisition to its push into industrial edge and AI applications. For investors watching Texas Instruments at a share price of $282.23, the Silicon Labs deal lands on top of a strong recent run. The stock is up 26.5% over the past...
